name: hashmark-studio
description: Visual agent orchestration UI for hashmark

scripts.build:server: tsup bin.ts server/index.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --no-splitting && tsup electron/main.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/electron --no-splitting --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external node-pty && tsup electron/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist/electron --no-splitting --external electron
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.dev:electron: tsup electron/main.ts --format esm --out-dir dist/electron --no-splitting --external electron --external better-sqlite3 --external node-pty --watch & tsup electron/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist/electron --no-splitting --external electron --watch
scripts.electron: lsof -ti :3200 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; electron dist/electron/main.js
scripts.electron:dev: pkill -f 'electron dist/electron/main.js' 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3200 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3201 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:electron" "npm run dev:client" "npx wait-on dist/electron/main.js dist/electron/preload.cjs dist/index.js http://localhost:3201 && NODE_ENV=development electron dist/electron/main.js"
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build:hono && HASHMARK_NO_OPEN=1 node dist/bin.js & npm run dev:client & npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:client && npx tauri build
